message:
refactor(compaction): extract magic numbers into named constants and add context_window_tokens field

Improve compaction configuration clarity and add the context_window_tokens
field to ResolvedCompactionSettings for future dynamic threshold computation:

Constants extracted:
- CHARS_PER_TOKEN_ESTIMATE (4): conservative chars/token ratio for GPT-family
  tokenizers, intentionally overestimates tokens to avoid exceeding context
- IMAGE_TOKEN_ESTIMATE (1200): approximate token cost per image content block
- IMAGE_CHAR_ESTIMATE (4800): derived IMAGE_TOKEN_ESTIMATE * CHARS_PER_TOKEN_ESTIMATE
  replacing the previous bare 4800 magic number in three estimate_tokens() arms

Struct changes:
- Added context_window_tokens: u32 to ResolvedCompactionSettings with a
  default of 200_000 (matching the current implicit assumption)
- Updated Default impl with inline comments explaining the reserve_tokens
  (~8% of context window) and keep_recent_tokens (10% of context window)
  default ratios

Callsite updates (all add ..Default::default()):
- src/main.rs: run() agent session construction
- src/bin/pi_debug.rs: debug session construction
- src/interactive.rs: manual compaction path + viewport refresh after
  extension streaming completes
- src/rpc.rs: RPC compaction handler + auto-compact path
- src/compaction.rs: all 8 test cases updated

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
